message:
test(harness): add resize chaos stress test

New resize_chaos.rs test for stress-testing resize handling:
- Rapid resize event sequences
- Random size transitions
- Edge cases (1x1, very wide, very tall)
- Validates buffer integrity after resize storms

Helps catch race conditions and buffer corruption in resize paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
